About

Building at the edge of content & code.

Digital Marketing & Retail graduate from Jesus and Mary College, University of Delhi (8.05 CGPA) — with hands-on experience across SEO auditing, content strategy, and social media campaigns.

Created 50+ SEO-optimised articles across 6+ websites. Designed 30+ social media graphics for an NGO. Certified in HubSpot Social Media Marketing, Microsoft Generative AI, and Prompt Engineering.

When not writing or auditing, I'm reading, making coffee, or building small digital things that make me happy.
